metadata.description: Hand gesture confirmation plugin for Claude Code using MediaPipe + native WKWebView host

plugins.name: gesture-confirm
plugins.description: Gesture-based confirmation for Claude Code — OK gesture/fist for allow/deny, finger count 1-5 for option selection via MediaPipe hand tracking and native WKWebView host

plugins.name: pong
plugins.description: Gesture-controlled Pong for Claude Code using MediaPipe Hands, three.js, and a native macOS WKWebView host

plugins.name: moto-race
plugins.description: Cyberpunk motorcycle racing game for Claude Code with 3 selectable tracks, AI opponents, gesture controls via MediaPipe Hands, three.js 3D rendering, and native macOS WKWebView host

plugins.name: bowling
plugins.description: Gesture-controlled bowling for Claude Code with 10-pin bowling, ball physics, strike/spare detection, gesture controls via MediaPipe Hands, three.js 3D rendering, and native macOS WKWebView host

plugins.name: fitness-coach
plugins.description: AI fitness coach for Claude Code – import standard exercise videos to generate pose templates, then score your movements in real-time using MediaPipe PoseLandmarker, cosine similarity, and online DTW via native macOS WKWebView host
